001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004
005import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
006
007public class ApiVersion implements Comparable<ApiVersion> {
008
009    private final int major;
010    private final int minor;
011    public ApiVersion(int major, int minor) {
012        this.major = major;
013        this.minor = minor;
014    }
015
016    public int getMajor() {
017        return major;
018    }
019
020    public int getMinor() {
021        return minor;
022    }
023
024    @Override
025    public int compareTo(ApiVersion other) {
026        int cmp = Integer.compare(getMajor(), other.getMajor());
027        if (cmp != 0) return cmp;
028        return Integer.compare(getMinor(), other.getMinor());
029    }
030
031    public int compareTo(KnownApiVersion other) {
032        return compareTo(other.get());
033    }
034
035    public boolean greaterThan(ApiVersion other) {
036        return compareTo(other) > 0;
037    }
038
039    public boolean greaterThan(KnownApiVersion other) {
040        return compareTo(other) > 0;
041    }
042
043    @Override
044    public boolean equals(Object o) {
045        if (this == o) return true;
046        if (o == null || getClass() != o.getClass()) return false;
047        ApiVersion that = (ApiVersion) o;
048        return major == that.major && minor == that.minor;
049    }
050
051    @Override
052    public int hashCode() {
053        return Objects.hash(major, minor);
054    }
055
056    public String toString() {
057        return "ApiVersion(major=" + major + ", minor=" + minor + ")";
058    }
059
060    public String serialize() {
061        return major + "," + minor;
062    }
063
064    public static ApiVersion deserialize(String s) {
065        if (s == null || s.isEmpty()) return null;
066        String[] parts = s.split(",");
067        Validate.isTrue(parts.length == 2);
068        return new ApiVersion(Integer.parseInt(parts[0]), Integer.parseInt(parts[1]));
069    }
070}
